primerTitle: Cognitive & quant aptitude — how to use it
primer:
## Cognitive & quant aptitude
A practice pool of timed cognitive/quant problems, **one deck per problem family**. Learn the *technique* in each deck's primer, then apply it on the cards — the goal is the method, not memorising answers. Best drilled in **exam mode** (~5 minutes per question).

Families: probability & games · the complement rule ('at least one') · random walks · counting · pigeonhole · digit/number puzzles · pseudocode (tracing & completion) · logic puzzles & conditional chains.
